title: taraxacum laetum
intro: Taraxacum laetum, also known as the yellow dandelion, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the dandelion genus. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum laetum include its high content of vitamins A, C, and K, as well as its ability to act as a diuretic and anti-inflammatory. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to support liver function, reduce blood pressure, and aid in digestion. Taraxacum laetum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used as a natural remedy for various health issues.
